arts.ttl: Rodri: 'I would take Nico Williams to Man City without a doubt'
arts.sum: Rodri has admitted he would ‘take’ Nico Williams to Manchester City ‘without a doubt’, with speculation surrounding the Athletic Bilbao winger still raging. The forward has continued to be a star man for Athletic as they push for Champions League qualification but reports have previously claimed that this will be Williams’ last season at the club.

arts.ttl: 2025 Club World Cup Draw RESULTS: Man City share a group with European heayweights, while Chelsea face a veteran Blues legend at tournament in the US next summer
arts.sum: Manchester City have been handed the headline match of the FIFA Club World Cup group stage as Pep Guardiola's side discovered their opponents for next summer's tournament.

arts.ttl: I sat through chaotic Club World Cup draw with Donald Trump surprise - Man City's reality is clear
arts.sum: Manchester City belatedly learned their FIFA Club World Cup opponents in a strange draw in Miami featuring an eccentric Giani Infantino and a cameo from Donald Trump.

arts.ttl: Rodri tells Man City to use their millions to sign £48m talent wanted by Arsenal this summer
arts.sum: Athletic Club’s Nico Williams is one of the most sought-after players in European football at present following his exceptional 2023/24 campaign for both club and country. The winger played a key role in Spain winning Euro 2024 in Germany this summer, which followed the 22-year-old’s displays that helped Athletic Club win the Copa del Rey […] The post Rodri tells Man City to use their millions to sign £48m talent wanted by Arsenal this summer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Messi’s Inter Miami to open 2025 Club World Cup as Man City drawn with Juventus
arts.sum: Draw for revamped competition held in Miami Kylian Mbappé and Neymar to meet in group stage Lionel Messi and Inter Miami will open this year’s Club World Cup against Egyptian club Al Ahly, as Kylian Mbappé and Neymar face off for Real Madrid and Al-Hilal. Premier League champions Manchester City will face Juventus, Moroccan side Wydad AC and Al Ain of the United Arab Emirates in the opening group stage of Fifa’s controversial tournament, while Chelsea will take on Brazil giants Flamengo, Mexico’s Club Leon and Esperance Tunis. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Club World Cup draw in full: Manchester City, Chelsea learn opponents for 2025 tournament
arts.sum: Premier League giants Manchester City and Chelsea learn who they will face at the revamped 2025 Club World Cup in the summer.

arts.ttl: Man City draw Juventus and Chelsea land Flamengo in Club World Cup
arts.sum: The new 32-team competition, championed by FIFA president Gianni Infantino, will be hosted in the United States next summer.

arts.ttl: Club World Cup draw pairs Man City with Juventus; Chelsea face Flamengo
arts.sum: Defending champions Manchester City will face Juventus in the group stage of next summer's Fifa Club World Cup, while Chelsea meet Flamengo.

arts.ttl: Club World Cup: Man City grouped with Juventus, Chelsea get Flamengo
arts.sum: Defending champions Manchester City have been grouped with Juventus for next summer's FIFA Club World Cup, while Chelsea have been drawn in the same group as Flamengo.

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Man City discover Club World Cup opponents as draw for 32-team tournament made
arts.sum: Reigning Premier League champions Manchester City were in Pot 1 for the new 32-team tournament to be held in the United States, with Chelsea - who were included for winning the Champions League in 2021 - in Pot 2
